scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web,admin -c blue,green,magenta "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:admin"
scripts.build: npm run build -w apps/api && npm run build -w apps/web && npm run build -w apps/admin
scripts.type-check: npm run type-check -w apps/api && npm run type-check -w apps/web && npm run type-check -w apps/admin
scripts.test: npm run test -w apps/api && npm run test -w apps/web && npm run test -w apps/admin
scripts.check: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run type-check
